rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §28.011 governs elective Bible course offerings in public schools. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 28.011. ELECTIVE COURSES ON THE BIBLE'S HEBREW SCRIPTURES (OLD TESTAMENT) AND NEW TESTAMENT AND THEIR IMPACT ON THE HISTORY AND LITERATURE OF WESTERN CIVILIZATION.
_note: No conflict; the cited statute is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
